howToRequest.title: How to Request Data Deletion
howToRequest.intro: If you would like us to delete your personal data from Nestor App CRM, please follow these steps:
howToRequest.step1: Send an email to georgios.pagonis@gmail.com with the subject line "Data Deletion Request"
howToRequest.step2: Include the platform you used to contact us (Facebook Messenger, Instagram, WhatsApp, or Telegram) and your username or phone number
howToRequest.step3: We will process your request within 30 days and confirm deletion via email

whatWeDelete.title: What We Delete
whatWeDelete.item2: Your contact information and platform identifiers

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For questions about data deletion, contact us at: georgios.pagonis@gmail.com

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Nestor App CRM ("we", "our", "us") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you interact with our application and services, including integrations with Facebook Messenger, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Telegram.

dataWeCollect.title: 2. Data We Collect
dataWeCollect.item1: Messages you send to us through social media platforms (text content only)
dataWeCollect.item2: Your platform user ID (e.g., Facebook PSID, Instagram IGSID, phone number)

howWeUse.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
howWeUse.item1: To respond to your inquiries and provide customer support
howWeUse.item2: To manage business communications via our CRM system
howWeUse.item3: To improve our services and response quality

dataSharing.title: 4. Data Sharing
dataSharing.content: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties, except as required by law or to provide the services you requested (e.g., AI-powered responses via OpenAI).

dataRetention.title: 5. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your messages and contact information for as long as necessary to provide our services. You may request deletion of your data at any time.

yourRights.title: 6. Your Rights
yourRights.content: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us at georgios.pagonis@gmail.com to exercise your rights.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.text: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at: georgios.pagonis@gmail.com

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance
acceptance.content: By using Nestor App CRM services, including messaging through Facebook Messenger, Instagram, WhatsApp, or Telegram, you agree to these Terms of Service.

services.title: 2. Services
services.content: Nestor App CRM provides business communication management, customer relationship management, and AI-assisted messaging services.

userResponsibilities.title: 3. User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.item1: Provide accurate information when communicating with us
userResponsibilities.item2: Do not use our services for unlawful purposes
userResponsibilities.item3: Respect the terms of the platform through which you contact us

limitation.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: Our services are provided "as is". We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services.

changes.title: 5. Changes
changes.content: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: 6. Contact
contact.text: For questions about these terms, contact us at: georgios.pagonis@gmail.com
